name: The Asking Machine - Worldbuilding and Writing Assistant
description:
Want to develop a setting or story by having someone ask you questions about it? Or do you just want to lore dump? The Asking Machine will help you with this.

Not a character, this is a prompt to get the LLM to act as an assistant. I recommend something other than JLLM (Janitor's native model) so that the context (memory) is larger. Use the chat memory; look up how to if you don't know how. If it starts roleplaying, you may want to delete the prompt in your API settings. I used DeepSeek V3 0324, so I am unsure how it will act on other models.
creator: Lord Misery
